description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge fence. The house features a clean, rectangular design with large windows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The backyard includes a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a small garden area with trees and shrubs, creating a private outdoor retreat. A covered patio with outdoor seating and a barbecue area is attached to the rear of the house, ideal for entertaining. The front of the house has a minimalist entryway with a small awning and a paved path leading to the door. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a private backyard featuring a pool and garden, all enclosed by a hedge fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, flat roof, and large windows, with the hedge fence partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, the hedge fence, and the backyard pool area with sun loungers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio, outdoor seating, barbecue area, and the pool with surrounding greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the hedge enclosure, pool, and garden, with the house's side elevation visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway with a flat awning, paved path, and no decorative columns or steps
